states.description: Android app drawer showing installed apps alphabetically

visual_cues: Video icon highlighted in bottom nav

states.description: Browse tab with Favorites, Storages, Local Network sections

visual_cues: list of playlists or 'No media files found'

states.description: More tab with Settings, About, and Streams buttons

visual_cues: links: Official website, Source code, Libraries, Authors

states.description: Detailed build info popup shown after tapping version

visual_cues: folder list: Alarms, Android, Audiobooks, DCIM, Documents, Download, Movies, Music, Notifications, Pictures, Podcasts, Ringtones, etc.

states.description: Dialog to add items to a new or existing playlist

visual_cues: options: Name, File name, Length, Date, Recently added, Media number
options like Display in list, Refresh, Show hidden files, Add a server favorite
SEARCH IN ALL MEDIA LIBRARY button below
Network share name or IP address field

states.description: Select directories to include for media library scan
visual_cues: checkboxes next to storage and folder entries

transitions.action: click(Add to favorites | Remove from favorites)
type(query) | click(SEARCH IN ALL MEDIA LIBRARY)

strategies.name: CREATE_PLAYLIST_FROM_FOLDER
steps: Locate target folder; tap three-dot menu on its row
In 'Add to new playlist' dialog, tap the Playlist name field
Confirm (enter on keyboard) to create and populate playlist
strategies.success_signal: Dialog closes returning to directory listing; playlist later appears in Playlists tab or under 'Add to existing playlist'
strategies.fallback: If field doesn't accept input, tap the field again before typing; if already created empty, tap its entry under 'Add to existing playlist'

strategies.name: ADD_FOLDER_TO_FAVORITES
steps: Tap three-dot menu icon precisely on that row
strategies.success_signal: Re-opening the menu shows 'Remove from favorites'; folder appears under Favorites in Browse
strategies.fallback: If wrong folder's menu opened, Back and retry with adjusted Y coordinate

strategies.name: SORT_LIST
steps: Optionally re-open sort menu and tap criterion again to toggle asc/desc
strategies.success_signal: Sort menu shows arrow ▲/▼ next to chosen field; list reorders
strategies.fallback: If criterion missing, switch to the appropriate sub-tab (e.g. TRACKS for Length)

strategies.name: SEARCH_GLOBAL
steps: Tap 'SEARCH IN ALL MEDIA LIBRARY' to broaden scope
strategies.success_signal: Results or 'NO MEDIA FOUND' displayed across all categories
strategies.fallback: Use 'x' to clear; press back arrow to exit search

strategies.name: OPEN_ABOUT_FOR_VERSION
steps: Tap More tab in bottom nav
Read version from grey box; tap version box for revision/libvlc/Compiled by details
strategies.success_signal: Version popup with Revision, libvlc, Compiled by fields appears
strategies.fallback: Don't search Settings for About; it's only on the More tab

strategies.name: CHANGE_SETTING
steps: Scroll to find the target setting (use sub-categories Interface/Video/Advanced if not on main page)
Tap the entry and select desired value or toggle checkbox
strategies.success_signal: Setting subtitle reflects new value or checkbox state changes
strategies.fallback: Use system Back to return up if entered wrong sub-menu

strategies.name: CLEAR_PLAYBACK_HISTORY
strategies.success_signal: Confirmation dialog dismissed; toast or silent completion
strategies.fallback: Note: 'Playback history' checkbox in main Settings only toggles saving, it does NOT clear

strategies.name: SCAN_FOLDER
steps: Tap three-dot menu on the folder row
strategies.success_signal: Toast: '<Folder> added to your scanned directories'

strategies.name: ADD_NETWORK_SERVER_FAVORITE
steps: Open protocol dropdown and choose SMB/FTP/etc.
Tap 'Network share name (or IP address)' field and type the address
Dismiss keyboard if it blocks OK
strategies.success_signal: Server appears in Favorites section of Browse

strategies.name: CHANGE_VIEW_LAYOUT
strategies.preconditions: On a list with overflow menu
steps: Tap 'Display in list' or 'Display in grid' toggle
strategies.fallback: Do not confuse the sort icon with the overflow menu

strategies.name: TOGGLE_SHOW_HIDDEN_FILES
strategies.success_signal: Checkbox becomes checked; hidden entries visible

strategies.name: PLAY_ALL_IN_FOLDER
steps: Tap the orange floating play FAB bottom-right
strategies.fallback: Ensure not in search view first; press back if so

dead_ends.failed_action: open context menu on Favorites card to add to playlist
dead_ends.note: Favorites cards only expose 'Remove from favorites'. Must access folder via Storages → Internal memory for full options.

dead_ends.failed_action: tap 'Playback history' checkbox to clear history
dead_ends.note: This checkbox only enables/disables saving. The clear action lives in Settings → Advanced → 'Clear playback history'.
There is no About entry inside Settings. It is on the More tab next to SETTINGS.

dead_ends.failed_action: sort by Length on ARTISTS sub-tab
dead_ends.note: Length sort is only available on TRACKS sub-tab.

dead_ends.failed_action: type text without first focusing the input
dead_ends.note: Must tap the 'Playlist name' field explicitly to bring up keyboard before typing.

dead_ends.failed_action: tap three-dot icon at slightly wrong Y
dead_ends.note: Adjacent folder's menu opens. Press Back and retry with corrected coordinates.

dead_ends.failed_action: tap presumed VLC icon without verifying
dead_ends.note: Adjacent apps (OpenTracks, OsmAnd) have orange icons too; verify the traffic-cone shape before tapping.

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: App launched and on any primary screen
abstract_steps: Identify the target screen's parent category (main library / file browser / settings / about)
Use the primary bottom navigation to switch to that category
Drill down via lists, sub-tabs, or directory entries to reach the target
failure_modes: Tapping a similar-looking icon for the wrong app/tab
Mistaking a sort/filter icon for the overflow menu
Believing target exists in a section where it doesn't
verification_checklist: Breadcrumb or active tab indicator matches the target
Expected section headers or content visible

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: On a list/browser where new entries can be created (playlist, favorite, server, stream)
abstract_steps: Trigger the 'add' action from an overflow menu or per-row context menu
Select sub-type if applicable (protocol, target list)
Focus the input field by tapping it
Type the required text
Dismiss keyboard if it covers the confirm button
Confirm via OK / enter / list selection
failure_modes: Typing before the input is focused
Confirm button hidden behind keyboard
Using a favorites-style entry that lacks the add option
verification_checklist: Dialog dismisses without error
New entry visible in its containing list
Re-opening source context menu shows 'Remove' instead of 'Add'

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry exists in a managed list (favorite, playlist, history)
abstract_steps: Open the entry's context menu via three-dot / long-press
Choose the remove/clear action
Confirm in any subsequent dialog
failure_modes: Confusing a toggle (enable/disable saving) with an actual clear/delete
Operating on the wrong row due to imprecise tap
verification_checklist: Entry no longer appears in list
Confirmation toast or dialog dismissal

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
abstract_steps: Navigate to the settings/preferences area
Locate the specific entry (scroll or use sub-categories)
Tap to open its selection dialog or toggle its checkbox
Choose the desired value
failure_modes: Setting located in a sub-category rather than main settings
Dependent setting being greyed out until parent is enabled
Accidentally toggling instead of opening details
verification_checklist: Subtitle/value reflects the new choice
Checkbox state matches intent

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: App provides the requested info in a visible UI area
abstract_steps: Navigate to the most likely informational area (About, properties, folder listing)
Scroll if necessary
Tap on aggregated values (e.g. version label) if a details popup is expected
Read the value and report it
failure_modes: Searching settings for info that's only on an About page
Reporting a count without scrolling through full list
Missing horizontally-scrollable items
verification_checklist: Information matches exact format requested
All scrollable content checked
Answer derived from currently visible UI state

categories.name: SEARCH
categories.precondition: On a list view supporting search
abstract_steps: Activate the search affordance
Type the query string
If scoped, broaden to global/all results via the provided button
Inspect results or empty-state message
failure_modes: Forgetting to broaden scope when query targets the whole library
Searching in the wrong sub-tab
verification_checklist: Query string visible in the search bar
Results list or 'no results' message displayed

categories.name: SORT_OR_FILTER
abstract_steps: Open sort/filter menu
Choose desired criterion
Re-open menu to verify arrow direction; tap again to toggle order if needed
failure_modes: Desired criterion unavailable on current sub-tab
Confusing display-layout overflow with sort menu
verification_checklist: Selected criterion highlighted with arrow
List visibly reorders if items present

categories.name: TRIGGER_ACTION
categories.precondition: Inside a container offering bulk actions (play all, scan, refresh)
abstract_steps: Locate the appropriate action affordance (FAB, overflow item, context menu)
Invoke it
Confirm any subsequent prompt
failure_modes: Action affordance hidden in a different mode (e.g. search view)
Invoking action on empty container produces no visible feedback
verification_checklist: Toast/dialog or state change confirms action
For playback: media player view opens or audio starts

categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device on home screen or app drawer
abstract_steps: If icon not on home, open app drawer
Scroll alphabetically to the target letter
Tap the correct icon, verifying its distinctive logo
Dismiss any first-run permission dialogs
failure_modes: Tapping a different app with a similarly colored icon
Permission dialog blocking subsequent interactions
verification_checklist: App's main screen visible
Bottom navigation/tabs of the intended app present
